topBlockingFindings.title: Insufficient colour contrast on CTA button
topBlockingFindings.description: The primary call-to-action button has a contrast ratio of 2.8:1, below the WCAG AA minimum of 4.5:1 for normal text.
nextActions: Increase button text colour darkness to achieve ≥ 4.5:1 ratio.
Re-run audit after updating design tokens.

topBlockingFindings.title: Navigation bar item missing from live page
topBlockingFindings.description: The 'Pricing' navigation link present in the Figma reference frame is absent from the rendered live page at desktop viewport (1280 × 800).
nextActions: Verify the navigation component renders all items from the data source.
Check for conditional rendering that might hide the link.

topBlockingFindings.title: Hero headline misaligned by 12 px
topBlockingFindings.description: The H1 hero text has a left offset of 36 px instead of the expected 24 px, causing a 12 px horizontal drift from the grid baseline.
nextActions: Update margin-left on the hero container to match the 24 px grid baseline.
Verify on both mobile and desktop viewports.

topBlockingFindings.title: Inconsistent font size in card body text
topBlockingFindings.description: Three feature cards use font-size 13 px while the design system specifies 14 px (body-sm). One card deviates to 12 px.
nextActions: Replace inline font-size overrides with the design-token class `text-body-sm`.

topBlockingFindings.title: Inconsistent vertical gap between cards
topBlockingFindings.description: The gap between feature cards alternates between 16 px and 24 px. The Figma specification uses a uniform 24 px gap.
nextActions: Set `gap: 24px` (or `gap-6` in Tailwind) on the cards grid container.

topBlockingFindings.title: Footer background colour differs from Figma reference
topBlockingFindings.description: The footer renders with #1a1a2e instead of the specified #0f0f1a, a brightness delta of 0.07.

topBlockingFindings.title: Social icon row shifted 8 px to the right
topBlockingFindings.description: The footer social-media icon row is positioned 8 px further right than in the Figma reference (mismatch ratio 3.2%).
nextActions: Remove the `pl-2` override on `.social-icons` and rely on the parent flex container's padding.

topBlockingFindings.title: Cookie banner text overflows container on mobile
topBlockingFindings.description: At the 375 × 812 (iPhone SE) viewport the cookie-consent banner body text clips at the right edge by approximately 6 px.
nextActions: Add `overflow-wrap: break-word` and right padding to the cookie banner text container.
